name: @aifabrix/miso-client
description: AI Fabrix Client SDK - Authentication, authorization, logging, and Express.js utilities

scripts.build:silent: pnpm run silent -- build:silent .temp/validation/01-build "pnpm run build"
scripts.test:silent: pnpm run silent -- test:silent .temp/validation/06-test "pnpm run test"
scripts.fmt:silent: pnpm run silent -- fmt:silent .temp/validation/02-fmt "pnpm run fmt"
scripts.md:lint:silent: pnpm run silent -- md:lint:silent .temp/validation/03-md-lint "pnpm run md:lint"
scripts.md:fix:silent: pnpm run silent -- md:fix:silent .temp/validation/04-md-fix "pnpm run md:fix"
scripts.lint:silent: pnpm run silent -- lint:silent .temp/validation/05-lint "pnpm run lint"
scripts.lint:fix:silent: pnpm run silent -- lint:fix:silent .temp/validation/05-lint-fix "pnpm run lint:fix"
scripts.tests:typecheck:silent: pnpm run silent -- tests:typecheck:silent .temp/validation/00-tests-typecheck "pnpm run tests:typecheck"
scripts.server:lint:fix:silent: pnpm run silent -- server:lint:fix:silent .temp/validation/server-01-lint-fix "pnpm --dir server run lint:fix"
scripts.server:lint:silent: pnpm run silent -- server:lint:silent .temp/validation/server-02-lint "pnpm --dir server run lint"
scripts.server:test:silent: pnpm run silent -- server:test:silent .temp/validation/server-03-test "pnpm --dir server run test"
scripts.server:build:silent: pnpm run silent -- server:build:silent .temp/validation/server-04-build "pnpm --dir server run build"
scripts.server:start:dev:silent: pnpm run silent -- --detach server:start:dev:silent .temp/validation/server-05-start-dev "pnpm --dir server run start:dev"
scripts.all: pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm run test && pnpm run test:integration:api && pnpm run test:integration && pnpm run build

author: AI Fabrix Team
